items.name_en: 🔥 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag 💥 The Puzzle features a distinctive rectangular shape outlined by unique geometric lines.🎁 This large version is made of glossy calfskin, featuring denim-style details.💋 Geometric Bag 33CM Puzzle Handbag, original imported calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜 The Puzzle handbag is the first tote bag launched by Creative Director Jonathan Anderson for LOEWE ⚡️ The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛 This large size version is made of soft grained calfskin *Large Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle *Removable 🎁

items.name_cn:
🔥 Large patent calfskin Panta Puzzle handbag 💥
Puzzle features a unique geometric outline of a rectangular shape 🎁 This large version is made of patent calfskin with denim-style details. 💋
Geometric Bag 33CMPuzzle handbag, imported patent calfskin 🐮🐮 A bestseller from the Luo family 👜
The Puzzle handbag was Jonathan Anderson's first tote for L0⚡️EWE 😻 The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines 👛
This large size is made of soft grained calfskin *The large Puzzle can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, and sunglasses 🕶
Carried crossbody, shoulder, clutch, or with top handle *Removable 🎁
Dimensions: 33CM~21.5CM~14.5CM
Item No.: 9165
Color: Black

items.name_en: 🔥 Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 creating a unique innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions 👄 adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft calfskin. 😻 Crossbody, shoulder or handheld *Adjustable detachable shoulder strap* Magnetic snap closure *Interior pocket* Synthetic leather lining* 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥

items.name_en: 🔥 New Glossy Calfskin 💥 Puzzle Fold Cropped handbag plays with geometric shapes again ⭐️ Inspired by the geometric lines of the classic handbag series, reinterpreted with inlays full of geometric architectural beauty, can be folded completely, a good companion for travel. The brand uses creative ingenuity to create soft and lightweight handbags, paired with low-key and elegant brand logos. This cropped version is made of glossy Nappa cowhide. 🌹 This continues the geometric aesthetics of the Puzzle series 🌼 Inspired by origami bags, allowing this Puzzle Fold Cropped to switch freely between 3D and flat 🌺 The leather is very fine. The Puzzle Fold handbag draws inspiration from the geometric lines of the brand's classic handbag series 👛 This version is made of soft glossy cowhide 🔥 Handle length 29CM Size: 39CM~12.3CM~12.5CM

items.name_en: 🔥 New Small Nappa Leather Puzzle Handbag💥Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines💋This small version is made of Nappa leather🍉The square mosaic pattern is inspired by🌻Josef Albers' "Homage to the Square" series👑This bag is a work from the LOEWE x Josef and Anni Albers series💄"Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody or carried by hand"Removable and adjustable shoulder strap'Zipper closure💝Calfskin zipper head'One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Fabric lining*Anagram embossed, LOEWE silver hot stamping and Josef💫Albers signature🌺
items.name_cn:
🔥 New Small Nappa Leather Puzzle Handbag💥Puzzle outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines💋This small version is made of Nappa leather🍉The square mosaic pattern is inspired by🌻Josef Albers' "Homage to the Square" series👑This bag is a work from the LOEWE x Josef and Anni Albers series💄"Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody or carried by hand"Removable and adjustable shoulder strap'Zipper closure💝Calfskin zipper head'One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Fabric lining*Anagram embossed, LOEWE silver hot stamping and Josef💫Albers signature🌺
Size: 24~16.5~10.5CM
Model: 9106
Color: Black/White
